message:
feat(ops): add lifecycle tracking, discovery PID refresh, and telemetry rollups

state: Add ProjectLifecycleTracker with LifecycleTrackerConfig for
monitoring instance health transitions (Healthy/Stale/Degraded/Missing).
Add evidence_trace field to InstanceAttribution providing explainable
attribution audit trail ordered strongest-to-weakest. Integrate lifecycle
events with discovery sightings for timeline-based alerting. Add 597
lines of new lifecycle tracking infrastructure with comprehensive tests.

discovery: Fix PID and version hint merging to prefer newer sightings
via refresh_pid_hint/refresh_version_hint helpers, preventing stale PID
regression when instances restart. Apply same temporal precedence logic
to alias bridge merges. Add tests for restart-like transitions, older
sighting non-regression, and alias bridge merge temporal preference.
Fix rustfmt-driven line wrapping across multiple function signatures.

data_source: Integrate ProjectLifecycleTracker into MockDataSource
construction from discovery instances, producing attribution snapshots,
lifecycle snapshots, and lifecycle events. Add tests verifying attribution
collisions surface correctly and lifecycle events carry collision flags.

storage: Add SummaryWindow enum (1m/15m/1h/6h/24h/3d/1w) with const
methods for label, duration_ms, bucket_start_ms, and rolling_start_ms.
Expand telemetry storage with 1371 lines of new rollup aggregation,
dashboard query support, and comprehensive test coverage including
boundary timestamps, overflow safety, and serde round-trips.

lib: Re-export new lifecycle and discovery types.
Cargo.toml: Add tracing-subscriber dev-dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
